name: Ban Item
description: Applies one or more ban options to an item.

name: Unban Item
description: Removes all ban options from an item and restores default item behavior.

name: Disable Crafting
description: Prevents players from crafting the item.

name: Tech Tree Bypass
description: Prevents the item from being researched while allowing child items to remain researchable.

name: Tech Tree Block Path
description: Prevents the item from being researched and blocks items below it on the Tech Tree.

name: No Tech Tree
description: Applies both TechTreeBypass and TechTreeBlockpath to the item.

name: Research Table Blocked
description: Prevents the item from being researched at a Research Table.

name: No Research
description: Applies both NoTechTree and ResearchTableBlocked to the item.

name: No Item Spawn
description: Prevents the item from spawning in any container and removes it from containers.

name: No Blueprint Spawn
description: Prevents the item's blueprint from spawning.

name: No Spawn
description: Applies both NoItemSpawn and NoBlueprintSpawn to the item.

name: Ban Item All
description: Applies all ban options to the item.

name: Ban Item In Config
description: Adds an item ban option to a ban item configuration.

name: Unban Item From Config
description: Removes an item ban option from a ban item configuration.

name: List Ban Item Configs
description: Lists all ban item configurations.

name: List Ban Item Config
description: Lists all items inside a specified ban item configuration.

name: List All Banned Items
description: Lists all configurations and all banned items inside them.

name: List Default Banned Items
description: Lists all default configurations and their banned items.

name: List Custom Banned Items
description: Lists all custom configurations and their banned items.

name: Clear Custom Banned Items
description: Clears all items from a custom configuration and unbans them.

name: Clear Default Banned Items
description: Clears all items from the default banned list and unbans them.

name: Enable Ban Item Config
description: Applies the banned items saved in a configuration.

name: Disable Ban Item Config
description: Removes the banned items saved in a configuration.

name: Delete Ban Item Config
description: Deletes a configuration and clears its banned items.
